description: Indulge in the luxury of pure leather with this pair of colour block mid-ankle shoes from timberland. In a classic silhouette and offering great Fit, this oxford makes for a fabulous addition to your wardrobe.UpperSuede upper with fabric lining for breathable comfortLacing system for a snug, customised fitPadded footbed for all-day comfortMid-ankle for better lower leg support and for styleMidsoleEVA midsole for impact protectionOutsoleTPU outsole with reactangular groovesRaised and textured heel for ergonomic comfort and styleshoe careWipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditionerDo not store in direct sunlight
